entities.description: mosquitto is an open source mqtt message broker  server  software that provides a lightweight publish subscribe messaging paradigm
ubuntu is an operating system used as the communication target in the text  requiring the installation of mosquitto tools
mqtt client is a case example in the text that uses mosquitto tools to demonstrate mqtt communication protocol functionality

relations.description: mosquitto tools need to be installed on the ubuntu system to enable mqtt communication functionality
the mqtt client example uses mosquitto tools to demonstrate mqtt communication protocol functionality
the mqtt client example is executed on the ubuntu system as part of the mqtt communication setup
